steps.text: Let's go on safari! These animals live far away in hot countries. Find the lion!
steps.feedback: Roar! The lion is called the king of the jungle. Now find the elephant!
Elephants are the biggest land animals on Earth! Now find the giraffe!
Giraffes have the longest necks of any animal — to reach the tallest leaves. Now find the zebra!
Every zebra has its own pattern of stripes — just like a fingerprint. Last one — find the monkey!
Monkeys are very clever — they use their hands like we do! Safari complete!
